mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0505_02-01#Sql001 */ TITLE_DESC, TITLE_VALUE, COMMDATE FROM ( SELECT ' ' AS TITLE_DESC, ' ' AS TITLE_VALUE, '999999' AS COMMDATE FROM DUAL ) UNION (SELECT COR_TITLE AS TITLE_DESC, COR_TITLE AS TITLE_VALUE, COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE AS COMMDATE FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION WHERE COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE >(SELECT concat(to_char(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYY')-5,to_char(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'MM')) FROM DUAL) AND COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE < = (SELECT concat(to_char(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYY'), to_char(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'MM')) FROM DUAL) ) ORDER BY COMMDATE DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0505_02-01#Sql003 */ INTO COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV (COR_USER_ID, COR_BROKER_CODE, COR_EMPLOYEE_ID, COR_BROWSE_FLAG, COR_REGISTRATION_DATE, COR_CREATE_DATE, COR_CREATE_BY, COR_UPDATE_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY) VALUES (#{req.userId}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.employeeId}, '1', IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createBy}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateBy})
mapper.update: MERGE /* @SQLID=SUB0505_02-01#Sql006_1 */ INTO CORDYS.COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION CON USING ( SELECT #{req.lectureId} AS COR_LEC_ID , #{req.userId} AS COR_USER_ID FROM DUAL ) data ON ( CON.COR_LEC_ID = data.COR_LEC_ID AND CON.COR_USER_ID = data.COR_USER_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG = '1' , COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , COR_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , COR_UPDATE_BY = #{req.userAccountUserId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( COR_LEC_ID , COR_USER_ID , COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE , COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG , COR_CREATE_DATE , COR_CREATE_BY , COR_UPDATE_DATE , COR_UPDATE_BY ) VALUES ( #{req.lectureId} , #{req.userId} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , '1' , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.userAccountUserId} , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{req.userAccountUserId} )
